heroTitle: Expert Masonry & Construction in Rochester, NY
heroSubtitle: Providing high-quality, aesthetically pleasing structures with an emphasis on craftsmanship, safety, and sustainability.
aboutText: At Clark & Wolcott, we specialize in providing a wide range of masonry construction services. We are dedicated to creating high-quality structures, no matter the size or scope of the project.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.quote: Clark & Wolcott completely transformed our backyard with a beautiful new stone patio. Their attention to detail and craftsmanship is unmatched.

testimonials.name: Michael Roberts
testimonials.quote: Professional, timely, and incredibly skilled. They repaired our historic brick chimney and it looks better than ever.

testimonials.name: Emily Davis
testimonials.quote: We hired them for a commercial retaining wall project. They finished ahead of schedule and the quality of work exceeded our expectations.
